summary: Embed transcendental-magic chunks + cross-tradition edge proposals (Mistral)
description:
Vector-store and edge-proposal stages for the 219 transcendental-magic chunks (doctrine 96 + ritual 123, todo:bd94d820). Deliberately NOT dependent on the tagging parent (todo:34c91dbc) — the two lines can proceed in parallel; do not wire depends-on links to tagging tickets.

Operational requirement: the edge-proposal stage runs on Mistral-Small-3.2-24B via scripts/run-mistral.sh — it must be started before propose_edges (single 3090: stop the Qwen3.5-27B server first if it is serving; coordinate timing with the tagging run, which needs the Qwen up). Embeddings use the pinned ollama/nomic-embed-text (config/embedding.toml), not the llama.cpp server.

Ordering inside this parent: embeddings before propose_edges (vector similarity is its input). propose_edges also assumes chunk nodes exist in the DB (graph_bootstrap, ticketed under the tagging parent as 2fb963e9) — if that has not run yet when this line starts, run graph_bootstrap first; it is a shared prerequisite, not a tagging dependency.

Promotion path per standing policy (2026-07-14): NO auto_promote_edges, at any confidence tier. All staged edges go through the /guru-review-edges queue-only review flow; the operator retains the final apply gate.
